title: Add prompt-flow and init default regression tests
description: Add or update tests covering `_select_from_list()` behavior, menu-driven runner/stack selection, `Other` fallback behavior, canonical language handling, and non-interactive defaults sourced from the shared stack catalog.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover `_select_from_list()` default selection, valid selection, invalid-then-valid retry, and out-of-range retry.
Tests cover interactive TypeScript selection pre-filling `npm test` and `tsc --noEmit`.
Tests cover `Other` falling back to free-text language/test/build prompts.
Tests cover runner menu invalid-entry retry behavior.
Tests cover non-interactive init sourcing Python defaults from `STACKS[0]`.
